notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

CP00-029 is a metadata-only service entrypoint contract pack: it defines the Test And Golden Case Set S01 contract, context ids, service module, validator, fixture, README, and RP00 validation coverage without executing tests as product behavior, generating golden fixtures, persisting golden fixtures, creating runtime routes, executing service logic, writing database/storage/product state, or completing RP00.P02.M07/RP00.P02/RP00.
A preliminary RP00 validation run before evidence creation failed only because docs/closeout-packs/cp00-029 evidence files did not exist yet.

The completed read-only Claude run is the single valid pack-level review for CP00-029; raw verdict was request_changes because evidence did not yet exist, and all P1/P2 items are resolved or adjudicated by this pack evidence and final validation.

preliminary_expected_failures.summary: Pre-evidence RP00 validation failed only because docs/closeout-packs/cp00-029 evidence files did not exist yet.

commands.command: claude --no-session-persistence -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode bypassPermissions --system-prompt "read-only pack-level code reviewer" --output-format text --max-budget-usd 5
commands.summary: Single valid pack-level read-only review completed; raw verdict request_changes, raw findings P0=0/P1=1/P2=2/P3=1, unresolved after adjudication P0=0/P1=0/P2=0.
